sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64642" key="makrogo/ggulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακρο-γόγγῠλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n64642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cylindrical</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σωλῆνες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
